hateful_detection_parsed.description: The meme uses a caricature of a Jewish man and text that suggests the subject is inherently disgusting and relies on laws to prevent hatred, which constitutes a direct attack and statement of inferiority based on religion/ethnicity.

diffusion_prompt_raw:
```json
{
  "hate_source": "The text overlay promotes antisemitic conspiracy theories by claiming Jewish people require laws to prevent hate and are inherently 'disgusting', directly targeting a religious group for abuse.",
  "hate_location": "COMBINED",
  "severity": "SURGICAL_BOTH",
  "original_text": "imagine being so disgustsing there have to be laws to try to stop normal people from hating you",
  "replacement_text": "Imagine being so misunderstood there have to be laws to try to stop normal people from laughing at you",
  "strategy": "Rewrite the text to target a neutral, absurd concept ('misunderstood'/'laughing') instead of a protected group, while visually neutralizing specific religious iconography (tallit and Star of David) into generic clothing elements to avoid stereotyping.",
  "flux_prompt": "Analyze the image and neutralize the character's religious identity to remove stereotyping. Transform the specific religious prayer shawl (tallit) into a generic white scarf or robe with simple blue trim. Replace the Star of David necklace with a neutral golden heart or circle pendant. Ensure the character remains a cartoon elderly man with a white beard, glasses, and top hat, sitting on a bench holding a candelabra, but strictly devoid of specific religious symbols. Preserve the cartoon style, lighting, and composition.",
  "expected_change": "The image will show the same character and layout, but the text will be changed to a self-deprecating or absurd statement, and the specific Jewish religious clothing and symbols will be replaced with generic equivalents, removing the antisemitic nature of the meme."
}
```
